headline: 3 Reasons Investors Watch S&P Global (SPGI)
summary: Over the past six months, S&P Global’s shares (currently trading at $414.07) have posted a disappointing 19.2% loss, well below the S&P 500’s 9.3% gain. This may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.
